statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); cd "$current_dir" 2>/dev/null || true; user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); dir=$(basename "$current_dir"); if git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then status=' ✗'; else status=''; fi; printf '%s@%s %s git:(%s)%s' "$user" "$host" "$dir" "$branch" "$status"; else printf '%s@%s %s' "$user" "$host" "$dir"; fi
